title: Case for Google Pixel 8 Pro,Magnetic PU Leather Wallet Flip Cover with [Shockproof Protective TPU][Standing Function][Card Holders] for Google Pixel 8 Pro,Gold butterfly
features: ✅【Compatible Models】: Specially designed for Google Pixel 8 Pro .Please check your phone model before ordering.

🍀【Material】: This Google Pixel 8 Pro case is made of high quality PU synthetic leather and soft TPU inner shell. Provides all-round protection for your phone that will protect your phone from dents, scratches or any other everyday wear and tear.

👛【Wallet Phone Case】: This Google Pixel 8 Pro Flip Wallet Case allows you to carry your phone and everyday essentials with you, the card slot design saves you from having to carry your wallet. Detachable wrist strap for easy portability,Magnetically designed to open and close easily while keeping items safe.
⚡【Phone Stand】: This Google Pixel 8 Pro case can be placed horizontally and used as a stand. It can be oriented at different angles to read or watch videos.
💗【Service】If there is any defect or quality problem, please contact us as soon as possible. We will be happy to help you. If you have any other questions, please contact us via Amazon's email system.
